title: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 2 Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Neversoft's definitive skateboarding sequel deepens combo systems, introduces manual linking, create-a-skater, and park editor tools across iconic real-world and fantasy levels.
narrative.core_loop: Chain flip tricks, grinds, and manuals in two-minute runs to hit score goals, collect S-K-A-T-E letters, and unlock new skaters and parks.

mechanics.map_notes: Multiplier grows as tricks link without bailing, defining high-score play.
mechanics.expression: Multiplier grows as tricks link without bailing, defining high-score play.

mechanics.map_notes: Speed from ramps and pushes affects trick height and line possibilities.
mechanics.expression: Speed from ramps and pushes affects trick height and line possibilities.

mechanics.map_notes: Cash and medal goals unlock new skaters, parks, and create-a-park tools.
mechanics.expression: Cash and medal goals unlock new skaters, parks, and create-a-park tools.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden tapes, gaps, and secrets reward level mastery.
mechanics.expression: Hidden tapes, gaps, and secrets reward level mastery.

mechanics.map_notes: Bail ends combo but run continues until timer expires.
mechanics.expression: Bail ends combo but run continues until timer expires.

mechanics.map_notes: Gaps, rails, and vert ramps demand precise approach angles.
mechanics.expression: Gaps, rails, and vert ramps demand precise approach angles.

mechanics.map_notes: Special tricks require directional input sequences on ramps.
mechanics.expression: Special tricks require directional input sequences on ramps.

mechanics.map_notes: Two-minute runs restart from level beginning on retry.
mechanics.expression: Two-minute runs restart from level beginning on retry.

mechanics.map_notes: Manual balance and lip tricks demand fine analog control.
mechanics.expression: Manual balance and lip tricks demand fine analog control.

mechanics.map_notes: S-K-A-T-E letters and video tapes gate completionist goals.
mechanics.expression: S-K-A-T-E letters and video tapes gate completionist goals.

mechanics.map_notes: Bail animations telegraph lost combo multiplier state.
mechanics.expression: Bail animations telegraph lost combo multiplier state.

mechanics.map_notes: Stat points buy improved air, hangtime, and balance attributes.
mechanics.expression: Stat points buy improved air, hangtime, and balance attributes.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 2 through its core sports loop.
